playbook.intent: Project hits final milestone or retainer ends. Done = handover artifacts delivered, final invoice settled, internal retro logged, referral/upsell motion triggered.
playbook.scope: Project hits final milestone or retainer ends. Done = handover artifacts delivered, final invoice settled, internal retro logged, referral/upsell motion triggered.

success-criteria.criterion: Reactivate stage complete: Referral ask sent

stage.name: Handover
stage.intent: Deliver handover artifacts; settle final invoice.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only after final invoice is paid.

stage.name: Retro
stage.intent: Internal retro: what to repeat, what to fix.

tasks.task: Log lessons in personal patterns doc

stage.decision-gate: Advance only with written retro. Mental-only doesn't count.

stage.name: Reactivate
stage.intent: Trigger referral, upsell, or retainer-restart motion.

tasks.task: Pitch upsell or retainer-restart if relevant

stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes only when at least one of testimonial/referral/upsell is requested.

extra.value: [Hiring employees or building a team — solo operator throughout, Enterprise procurement processes — SMB / startup buyers only]
[Active freelance practice with at least one paying client, A bookkeeping / time-tracking baseline in place]
[Treating decision_gate as a suggestion — playbook collapses to a checklist if gates are not enforced, Skipping written artifacts because 'it's in my head' — kills traceability and future re-use]
['Did every stage produce a written artifact a stranger could read?', 'Did I actually advance only when the decision_gate criterion was met?']
{human: faion get-content project-closure-debrief --format md, agent: faion get-content project-closure-debrief --format context, json: faion get-content project-closure-debrief --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft for F-064 P3 technical-freelancer persona, atomic angle'}]
